nasb.text: Let them flow away like water that runs off; When he aims his arrows, let them be as headless shafts.

esv.text: Let them vanish like water that runs away; when he aims his arrows, let them be blunted.

cnv.text: 願他們像流水般消逝； 願他們射箭的時候，箭頭折斷。

ccb.text: 愿他们如流水逝去， 愿他们弯弓搭箭时箭头折断。

csbs.text: 愿他们像自行流去的水那样消逝； 愿他们拉弓时，他们的箭头仿佛自行折断。
